name: Apple Oatmeal Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup C and H Brown Sugar; packed
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together sugar, butter, egg, and water.
2. Combine flour, baking powder, soda, spices, and salt in a separate bowl.
3. Stir the dry ingredients into the creamed mixture until well combined.
4. Fold in oats, apple, and raisins.
5. Drop by teaspoonfuls, about 2 inches apart, onto a greased cookie sheet.
6. Bake in a 375 degree F (190 degree C) oven for 15 minutes.
7. Cool on a rack.
